issue_summary: Added toObject( Fieldable ) to FieldType. This lets the DocumentBuilder convert lucene Document to a SolrDocument. This patch also lets the DocumentBuilder convert a SolrInputDocument to a lucene Document.
javadoc_before:
/**
 * Represent the field and boost information needed to construct and index
 * a Lucene Document.  Like the SolrDocument, the field values need to
 * match those specified in schema.xml 
 * 
 * @author ryan
 * @version $Id$
 * @since solr 1.3
 */
javadoc_after:
/**
 * Represent the field and boost information needed to construct and index
 * a Lucene Document.  Like the SolrDocument, the field values need to
 * match those specified in schema.xml 
 * 
 * By default, this will keep every field value added to the document.  To only
 * keep distinct values, use setKeepDuplicateFieldValues( "fieldname", false);
 *
 * @author ryan
 * @version $Id$
 * @since solr 1.3
 */
